examples: Combining with volcanic activities, Eocene hypabyssal rocks, tonalite, intruded in Cretaceous volcanic strata.
This area has the character of the porphyry copper multi metal metallogenic system of hypabyssal-super hypabyssal rock from deep source.
The volcanic activity and subsequent hypabyssal and super hypabyssal porphyry body activity play an important role in uranium mineralization.
